languages.text:
Wearer's attacks gain bonus based on used weapon type:
- melta and plasma weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% armour penetration
- bolter and solid gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% overpenetration chance
- las and flamer gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% dodge reduction
- chain and primitive gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% parry reduction
- force and power gain +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} deflection penetration
- exotic gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% chance to inflict random common debuff for 1 round

The user's attacks gain bonuses based on the type of weapon used:
-<indent=5%>Attacks with melta and plasma weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with bolter and solid-projectile weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} chance.</indent>

-<indent=5%>Attacks with chain and primitive weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}parry reduction{/g}.</indent>

languages.text:
Атаки обладателя аугмента получают бонусы в зависимости от типа оружия:
-<indent=5%>Атаки плазменным и мельта-оружием получают +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Шанс {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}сквозного пробития{/g} для атак болтерным и пулевым оружием увеличен на +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Атаки лазерным оружием и огнеметами получают +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}снижения уклонения{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Атаки цепным и примитивным оружием получают +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}снижения парирования{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Атаки психосиловым и силовым оружием получают +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} {g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}игнорирования отражения{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Атаки экзотическим оружием получают +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% шанс наложить случайный общий {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}негативный эффект{/g} на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}.</indent>

languages.text:
Die Angriffe des Nutzers erhalten basierend auf der verwendeten Waffe Boni:
-<indent=5%>Angriffe mit Melter- und Plasmawaffen erhalten +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Angriffe mit Bolter- und Festgeschosswaffen erhalten +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}Überdurchdringung{/g}-Chance.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Angriffe mit Laser- und Flammenwerfer-Waffen erhalten +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}Ausweichen-Reduktion{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Angriffe mit Ketten und primitiven Waffen erhalten +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}Parieren-Reduktion{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Angriffe mit Kraft- oder Energiewaffen erhalten +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} {g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}Deflektionsnegierung{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Angriffe mit exotischen Waffen erhalten +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % Chance auf einen zufälligen gewöhnlichen {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negativen Effekt{/g} für 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g}.</indent>

languages.text:
Los ataques del usuario reciben bonificaciones en función del arma utilizada:
-<indent=5%>Los ataques con armas de fusión y plasma obtienen un +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Los ataques con bólters y armas de proyectiles sólidos obtienen un +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de probabilidad de {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}sobrepenetración{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Los ataques con armas láser y de llamas obtienen un +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}reducción de esquiva{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Los ataques con armas de sierra y primitivas obtienen un +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}reducción de parada{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Los ataques con armas de fuerza y energía obtienen +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} de {g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}negación de desvío{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Los ataques con armas exóticas obtienen un +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de probabilidad de infligir un {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}efecto negativo{/g} común aleatorio durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}.</indent>

-<indent=5%>Los ataques con bólters y armas de proyectiles sólidos obtienen un +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de probabilidad de {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}sobrepenetración{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Los ataques con armas láser y de llamas obtienen un +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}reducción de esquiva{/g}.</indent>

-<indent=5%>Los ataques con armas de fuerza y energía obtienen +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} de {g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}negación de desvío{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Los ataques con armas exóticas obtienen un +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de probabilidad de infligir un {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}efecto negativo{/g} común aleatorio durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}.</indent>

languages.text:
Kullanıcının saldırıları, kullanılan silahın türüne bağlı olarak bonuslar kazanır:
-<indent=5%>Melta ve plazma silahlarıyla yapılan saldırılar +%{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değeri kazanır.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Bulon ve katı mermi silahlarıyla yapılan saldırılar +%{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}delip geçme{/g} olasılığı kazanır.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Lazer ve alevsaçan silahlarıyla yapılan saldırılar +%{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}kaçınma azaltımı{/g} değeri kazanır.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Motorlu ve ilkel silahlarla yapılan saldırılar +%{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}savuşturma azaltımı{/g} değeri kazanır.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Kudret ve güç silahlarıyla yapılan saldırılar +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} {g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}saptırma yadsıması{/g} değeri kazanır.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Egzotik silahlarla yapılan saldırılar +%{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} rastgele bir yaygın {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}olumsuz etki{/g} oluşturma olasılığı kazanır. Bu etki, 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.</indent>
languages.original_text:
The user's attacks gain bonuses based on the type of weapon used:
-<indent=5%>Attacks with melta and plasma weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with bolter and solid-projectile weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} chance.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with las and flamer weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with chain and primitive weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}parry reduction{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with force and power weapons gain +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}{g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}deflection negation{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with exotic weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% chance to inflict a random common {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.</indent>

traits.locale_text:
Kullanıcının saldırıları, kullanılan silahın türüne bağlı olarak bonuslar kazanır:
-<indent=5%>Melta ve plazma silahlarıyla yapılan saldırılar +%{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değeri kazanır.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Bulon ve katı mermi silahlarıyla yapılan saldırılar +%{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}delip geçme{/g} olasılığı kazanır.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Lazer ve alevsaçan silahlarıyla yapılan saldırılar +%{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}kaçınma azaltımı{/g} değeri kazanır.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Motorlu ve ilkel silahlarla yapılan saldırılar +%{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}savuşturma azaltımı{/g} değeri kazanır.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Kudret ve güç silahlarıyla yapılan saldırılar +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} {g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}saptırma yadsıması{/g} değeri kazanır.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Egzotik silahlarla yapılan saldırılar +%{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} rastgele bir yaygın {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}olumsuz etki{/g} oluşturma olasılığı kazanır. Bu etki, 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.</indent>

languages.text:
根据所使用的武器类型，使用者的攻击获得不同加成：
- <indent=5%>使用热熔武器或等离子武器攻击时，获得{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%的{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}。</indent>
- <indent=5%>使用爆矢枪或实弹投射武器攻击时，获得{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%的{g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}过度穿透{/g}触发率。</indent>
- <indent=5%>使用激光武器或火焰喷射器攻击时，获得{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%的{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}闪避减免{/g}。</indent>
- <indent=5%>使用链锯或原始武器攻击时，获得{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%的{g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}招架减免{/g}。</indent>
- <indent=5%>使用力场武器或能量武器攻击时，获得{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}点{g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}偏转穿透{/g}。</indent>
- <indent=5%>使用异种武器攻击时，有{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%的概率施加一个随机常规{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}负面效果{/g}，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。</indent>
languages.original_text:
The user's attacks gain bonuses based on the type of weapon used:
-<indent=5%>Attacks with melta and plasma weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with bolter and solid-projectile weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} chance.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with las and flamer weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with chain and primitive weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}parry reduction{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with force and power weapons gain +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}{g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}deflection negation{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with exotic weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% chance to inflict a random common {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.</indent>

- <indent=5%>使用热熔武器或等离子武器攻击时，获得{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%的{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}。</indent>

- <indent=5%>使用异种武器攻击时，有{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%的概率施加一个随机常规{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}负面效果{/g}，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。</indent>

languages.text:
Les attaques de l'utilisateur gagnent des bonus en fonction du type d'arme utilisé :
-<indent=5%>Les attaques des armes à fusion ou à plasma gagnent +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Les attaques des bolters et des armes à projectiles solides gagnent +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de chances de {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}surpénétration{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Les attaques des armes laser et lance-flammes gagnent +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}réduction d'esquive{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Les attaques des armes tronçonneuses et primitives gagnent +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}réduction de parade{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Les attaques des armes énergétiques et de force gagnent +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} de {g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}négation de déflexion{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Les attaques des armes exotiques gagnent +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de chances d'infliger un {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}effet négatif{/g} commun aléatoire pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.</indent>
languages.original_text:
The user's attacks gain bonuses based on the type of weapon used:
-<indent=5%>Attacks with melta and plasma weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with bolter and solid-projectile weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} chance.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with las and flamer weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with chain and primitive weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}parry reduction{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with force and power weapons gain +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}{g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}deflection negation{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with exotic weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% chance to inflict a random common {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.</indent>

Les attaques de l'utilisateur gagnent des bonus en fonction du type d'arme utilisé :
-<indent=5%>Les attaques des armes à fusion ou à plasma gagnent +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Les attaques des bolters et des armes à projectiles solides gagnent +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de chances de {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}surpénétration{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Les attaques des armes laser et lance-flammes gagnent +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}réduction d'esquive{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Les attaques des armes tronçonneuses et primitives gagnent +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}réduction de parade{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Les attaques des armes énergétiques et de force gagnent +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} de {g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}négation de déflexion{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Les attaques des armes exotiques gagnent +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e} % de chances d'infliger un {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}effet négatif{/g} commun aléatoire pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.</indent>

languages.text:
使用者の攻撃は、使用する武器の種類に応じてボーナスを得る：
-<indent=5%>メルタおよびプラズマ武器による攻撃は、+{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}を得る。</indent>
-<indent=5%>ボルターおよび実体弾武器による攻撃は、+{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%の{g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}過貫通{/g}確率を得る。</indent>
-<indent=5%>ラスおよびフレイマー武器による攻撃は、+{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%の{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}回避減少{/g}を得る。</indent>
-<indent=5%>チェーンおよびプリミティブ武器による攻撃は、+{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%の{g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}受け流し減少{/g}を得る。</indent>
-<indent=5%>フォースおよびパワー武器による攻撃は、+{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}の{g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}偏向無効{/g}を得る。</indent>
-<indent=5%>エキゾチック武器による攻撃は、+{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}%の確率で、ランダムな一般的{g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}負の効果{/g}を1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}付与する。</indent>
languages.original_text:
The user's attacks gain bonuses based on the type of weapon used:
-<indent=5%>Attacks with melta and plasma weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with bolter and solid-projectile weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:OverpenetrationFullGlossary}overpenetration{/g} chance.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with las and flamer weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}dodge reduction{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with chain and primitive weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% {g|Encyclopedia:ParryReduction}parry reduction{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with force and power weapons gain +{uip|Value2|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}{g|Encyclopedia:DeflectionNegation}deflection negation{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Attacks with exotic weapons gain +{uip|Value|4c369dab8f8b45379196373ac26f666e}% chance to inflict a random common {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.</indent>
